Bullet Train (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $103,368,602Details
International Box Office $135,166,361
Worldwide Box Office $238,534,963
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,735,722
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,358,744
Total $9,094,466
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ladybug is an unlucky assassin determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans, as Ladybug’s latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe—all with connected, yet conflicting, objectives—on the world's fastest train… and he’s got to figure out how to get off.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,030,156 (29.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.44 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$85,900,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,357 opening theaters/4,357 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $117,406,309

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 5th, 2022 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
August 5th, 2022 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures

July 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Sweden)
August 3rd, 2022 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: September 27th, 2022 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong and bloody violence, pervasive language, and brief sexuality.

Synopsis

Ladybug is an unlucky assassin determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans, as Ladybug’s latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe—all with connected, yet conflicting, objectives—on the world's fastest train… and he’s got to figure out how to get off.
